description: Determines the properties of the creature's poison.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's poison.

entries.description: The poison does damage if a resistance roll is failed.

descriptionTranslations.en: The poison does damage if a resistance roll is failed.

entries.description: The poison is fatal if a resistance roll is failed.

descriptionTranslations.en: The poison is fatal if a resistance roll is failed.

entries.description: There is a delayed effect to the poison, taking effect within the hour.

descriptionTranslations.en: There is a delayed effect to the poison, taking effect within the hour.

entries.description: There is a delayed effect, taking effect within the day.

descriptionTranslations.en: There is a delayed effect, taking effect within the day.

entries.description: There is a delayed effect, taking effect within the week.

descriptionTranslations.en: There is a delayed effect, taking effect within the week.

entries.description: The poison has an unusual effect on the target other than damage, such as putting the victim to sleep or causing paralysis. The target likely still gets a resistance roll to avoid the effect.

descriptionTranslations.en: The poison has an unusual effect on the target other than damage, such as putting the victim to sleep or causing paralysis. The target likely still gets a resistance roll to avoid the effect.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
